rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.035, which governs lobbyist restrictions for board members and department officials. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A person may not be a member of the board or act as the director of the department or the general counsel to the board or the department if the person is required to register as a lobbyist under Chapter 305 because of the person's activities for compensation on behalf of a profession related to the operation of the department.
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely different subject matters.
